summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are recommended. No PR has a complete merge preflight; #59695 has a narrow repair path, #59694 is quarantined for central security review, and the remaining broader feature PRs need maintainer judgment before merge or repair.

actions.reason: Broad user-facing doctor feature with incomplete review-bot and merge preflight proof; maintainer judgment is required before merge or repair.
Security-sensitive surface; route the exact PR centrally and do not merge, close, comment, label, or repair it through Clownfish backlog automation.

Message-delivery behavior change has a failing proof check and unresolved review-bot/author-follow-up context; maintainer judgment is required.
Build a cluster-scoped repair artifact for the only narrow non-security PR with a concrete fix path.
